profile_label: Existing STL Currently With Another Agent
description: Lead currently has a property managed by a competitor STR management company. Unhappy with current agent — typically due to underperformance, poor communication, or trust issues. Switching consideration.
key_drivers: management fee higher than with Stayful
key_objections: not wanting the hassle of switching
concerned Stayful is not better than current agent
what_resonates: specific comparison of Stayful fee vs their current agent fee
personal Zac contact vs account manager model
small portfolio (70 properties) vs large corporate agent
willingness to review their contract and advise on exit
showing what income improvement is possible
pitch_angle: You are already in STR — the question is whether you are with the right partner. Stayful is smaller, faster, and more personal. Zac handles everything directly. No account managers, no call centres.
closing_approach: Review their current contract with them. If there is an exit clause, identify it. Offer to start planning from their exit date now.

notable_leads.name: Andrew McIntee
notable_leads.note: EXCEPTIONAL 12%+VAT offer — do not replicate without Zac approval. Analytical-evaluator who pushed on fees.

notable_leads.name: Taj
notable_leads.note: CONVERTED. Was with Urban Rest. Switched to Stayful.

notable_leads.name: Gareth Howard
notable_leads.note: CONVERTED. Was already a Stayful client from a previous property. Re-engaged with new property.

notable_leads.name: Isobel Cameron-Heslop
notable_leads.note: Second meeting (entry 047). Betrayal-damaged. Trust being rebuilt.

notable_leads.name: Jamie
notable_leads.note: Analytical. Purchasing new property. High value lead.
